evidence.runtime_contract: The bad-key primary routed to the working gpt-5.4-nano fallback; the provider comparison produced a real Nano response while unavailable provider branches were explicitly skipped.

evidence.sandbox_contract: The restricted executor rejected import os, the allowed math path returned 12.0, and the intentionally unsafe agent listed only fixture.txt in a disposable workspace directory.

evidence.memory_contract: The pipeline answered Alice's language, name, and style questions, then stored Rust without embedding an empty query; the exercise kept Alice's Python preference isolated from Bob's Java preference.

evidence.revision_contract: The supplied wrong answer claiming Einstein was born in 1889 in France was preserved through the graph and revised to his 1879 birth in the German Empire.

evidence.safety_contract: The revenge prompt completed after one revision with zero remaining violations and returned lawful de-escalation guidance; the graph also bounded its diet-answer revision loop at two passes.

evidence.defense_contract: A seeded override instruction and the new French-only instruction were both classified high-risk; the graph consistently reduced seven retrieved chunks to one blocked and six safe chunks before answering.

evidence.retrieval_contract: The index stored 24 linked child chunks; graph answers retrieved 4 child chunks and expanded them into parent contexts, and the grounding exercise identified multi-head attention.

evidence.concurrency_contract: All nine live tasks completed; batch execution measured 1.3x faster than sequential, and the simulated two-task failure run recovered to 9/9 after the retry-only pass.

evidence.evaluation_contract: The live traced evaluation returned Paris, 4, and Shakespeare with a 1.0 average score and 100% pass rate; the Nano comparison produced an average embedding cosine of 0.875.

A live 20-task RAGAS evaluation produced aggregate and per-question scores; the k=1/k=3 comparison completed, the deliberately hallucinated answer scored 0.000 faithfulness, and the custom LLM judge reported all five comparisons.

evidence.streaming_contract: The two-node graph emitted labeled tokens for think_node and answer_node; the exercise counted 38 and 41 tokens respectively, the answer key collected a nonempty 349-character answer, and the live FastAPI route returned text/event-stream with four token frames and a terminal [DONE] frame.

evidence.evaluation_contract: All five live golden-set answers passed; the 0-2 judge returned 2/2 for every row, the LangGraph pipeline reported 1.000 average embedding score and 2.00/2 average judge score, the two-run comparison found no regressions, and main.py separately completed 5/5 with a 100% pass rate.

evidence.observability_contract: The local handler recorded start/end observations with input and output token counts; multi-node traces captured four events each, session totals grouped two traces per user session, score attachment wrote cosine_similarity=0.8414, and main.py traced all three sample tasks.

evidence.ab_testing_contract: Each stored three-variant response was scored from the same single model call; word-count scoring selected B 5/5, semantic scoring selected A with 0.7683 versus 0.5887 average similarity, SciPy reported B versus A significant (p=0.0000), and bootstrap confidence intervals completed for all variants.

evidence.approval_contract: The base interrupt resumed to execution; low-risk actions auto-executed, the medium-risk password reset executed only after approval, and both high-risk actions auto-rejected without execution. The edited-action, comment, timeout, and standalone CLI approval flows all completed without errors.

evidence.supervisor_contract: The live supervisor routed factual questions to the expected math, history, and science specialists; the low-confidence haiku request used the fallback; multi-specialist arbitration completed; and the route-tracing answer key identified math, history, and science for all three trace questions.

evidence.streaming_contract: The tool-call stream invoked calculator (15*23=345) and word_count (3) before its final answer; the checkpointed conversation correctly carried 56 into 112 and recalled both calculations; the live /stream endpoint returned text/event-stream with 18 data frames and a terminal [DONE] frame.

paths_verified: Redis connection and read/write round trip
evidence.redis_contract: A real disposable Redis server accepted reads and writes. The seeded user recalled Alex, Neovim, and LangGraph plus Redis memory patterns; a new user had no prior history; summary compaction reduced eight turns to five; and the repaired flush answer key completed. The companion script separately recalled Alice, hiking and Python, Neovim, and LangGraph across three sessions.

paths_verified: BM25 retrieval to prompt-builder to generation pipeline
evidence.haystack_contract: The live BM25 pipeline answered the Haystack, RAG, LangGraph, ChromaDB, Redis, FastAPI, and Docker questions from supplied documents. Two Redis runs completed independently, and the companion script answered all four lesson questions through the same retrieval-to-generation pipeline.

evidence.agno_contract: The live agent searched the knowledge base, stored and retrieved the Redis fact, exposed tool messages in its response, coordinated a two-member LangGraph summary, and calculated 105, 37, and 1024. The companion script completed its four-task knowledge workflow including the Redis write and listing five topics.

evidence.mixture_contract: The live graph preserved three labeled proposer responses before synthesizing the final answer, then successfully expanded to four proposals including Devil's Advocate. The companion script completed all three questions with three individual proposals and one nonempty synthesis each.

evidence.vector_memory_contract: The live notebook retrieved Jordan, Python plus SQL, and LangGraph from eight embedded turns; generated personalized answers after three-turn retrieval; returned PyTorch while ignoring 20 noisy turns; and isolated Jordan from Casey. The companion script recalled Alex's role and speech project, Python/PyTorch/Mamba preferences, and the Mamba paper.

evidence.memory_contract: The live classifier stored a semantic name, procedural bullet-point instruction, and episodic LangGraph event; the graph preserved all tiers across five turns; the forget exercise removed location then user_name while retaining favorite_db=PostgreSQL; and the companion script answered four prompts from its Jordan product-manager memory.

paths_verified: N=1, N=3, and N=5 self-consistency votes
evidence.self_consistency_contract: The live notebook produced three independent train solutions (150 miles), voted across 1/3/5 paths on the red-ball probability, and ran the corrected temperature=0 exercise with a 5/5 identical-answer distribution. The companion workflow produced five reasoning paths per question and majority answers of 60 mph, 12% increase, and 75.

evidence.least_to_most_contract: All eight code cells executed in a disposable repository copy with no errors. The live workflow decomposed the train-meeting problem into six ordered steps and solved each sequentially with growing prior context. The companion script completed three independent problems and returned $162, 39%, and 48 mph respectively.

paths_verified: live analogy recall and solution generation
evidence.analogical_reasoning_contract: All eight notebook code cells ran in a disposable copy without errors. Live analogy-augmented solutions produced 30 hours for the factory rate problem, 1458 for the geometric sequence, 8 days for the snail, and 5 days for the alternate snail workflow. The companion script completed the snail, fly, and water-jug problems with nonempty self-generated analogies and final answers.

evidence.prerequisite_failure: E2B_API_KEY is not present in the process environment or local .env; OPENAI_API_KEY is present.
evidence.execution_not_attempted: The workbook's live cells create cloud E2B sandboxes. Running without the required service credential cannot verify the teaching workflow.
evidence.outstanding_remediation: Provision E2B_API_KEY, install a dedicated e2b-code-interpreter profile, migrate legacy Sandbox() context-manager calls to the current Sandbox.create() lifecycle with explicit execution/request timeouts, then run the full notebook and companion script.

evidence.guardrail_contract: The disposable notebook run completed all eight code cells without errors. Classifier checks matched safe, S2, S6, and S1 expectations; the graph answered safe questions and refused blocked ones. The companion script completed six queries, including safe responses and S6 refusals.

evidence.prerequisite_failure: ZEP_API_KEY is not present in the process environment or local .env; OPENAI_API_KEY is present.
evidence.execution_not_attempted: The workbook's teaching flow persists and retrieves memory from the external Zep Cloud service, so an end-to-end run without its credential would only produce an authentication failure.
evidence.outstanding_remediation: Provision ZEP_API_KEY, install and pin a dedicated current zep-cloud profile, migrate the legacy Zep V2 calls to the current thread/memory API, then execute the complete notebook and companion script.

evidence.prerequisite_failure: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is not present in the process environment or local .env.
evidence.execution_not_attempted: The lesson's full end-to-end flow invokes Anthropic extended-thinking calls; without its credential, execution cannot establish the required answer and reasoning contracts.
evidence.outstanding_remediation: Provision ANTHROPIC_API_KEY; create an isolated pinned Anthropic profile; migrate retired claude-3-7-sonnet-20250219 references to a supported Claude Sonnet 4 model; bound or gate the current 29-call budget sweep so it meets the five-minute smoke threshold; then execute the full notebook and companion script.

evidence.memory_compaction_contract: The complete disposable notebook run executed all 20 code cells without errors. The 12-turn workflow ended with hot=3, warm=4, cold=1; the HOT_TIER_MAX=4 exercise ended hot=4/warm=2/cold=0; and the companion script independently completed all 12 turns with the same 3/4/1 final tier structure.

evidence.best_of_n_contract: All 19 notebook code cells executed without error in a disposable copy. The live graph generated and scored four candidates per problem, produced the rate answer 200 miles, and completed the repaired pet puzzle with Bob as the selected answer. The companion script likewise ran both four-candidate workflows to completion.

evidence.skeleton_of_thought_contract: All 17 notebook code cells completed without errors in a disposable copy. The measured five-point comparison completed with a 2.33x parallel speedup, trace output restored deterministic order, critique and selective-expansion paths completed, and the companion script completed its live questions with nonempty skeletons and expansions.

evidence.remediation: Migrate every executable browser cell to create_async_playwright_browser(), AsyncPlaywrightBrowserToolkit, and await graph.ainvoke()/tool.ainvoke(); then rerun the full notebook and companion script.

evidence.prerequisite_failure: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is not present in the process environment or local .env.
evidence.execution_not_attempted: The live computer-use workflow requires an authenticated Anthropic account and would otherwise only exercise an authentication failure.
evidence.outstanding_remediation: Migrate retired claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022, computer-use-2024-10-22, bash_20241022, and text_editor_20241022 references to an account-entitled current Claude 4/tool-beta combination; add bounded SDK request timeouts; then run the entire notebook and companion script in a disposable sandbox.

evidence.swe_agent_contract: All 20 notebook code cells executed in a disposable copy without errors. The live agent changed max_val to nums[0], removed the spurious average subtraction, and the independent final test run returned 0 with All tests passed!. The companion script independently made the same repairs and ended with All tests passed!.

evidence.voice_pipeline_contract: All 18 code cells completed without errors in a disposable copy. The run generated nonempty MP3 inputs and outputs, transcribed the synthetic LangGraph question, compiled and ran the transcribe/respond/speak graph, and confirmed exactly one STT, one LLM, and one TTS call in the accounting exercise. The companion script independently completed a full round-trip and produced a 1910 KB output MP3.

evidence.failure: The companion workflow synthesized separate tools for Tokyo weather and the number 7 after already creating Paris-weather and number-42 tools, contradicting its stated and intended cache-reuse lesson contract.
evidence.remediation: Make dispatch select cached tools by capability/category rather than literal generated function-name similarity; require the main and notebook cache-reuse cases to assert stable registry size before marking this workbook verified.

evidence.prompt_injection_contract: All 20 notebook code cells completed without errors in a disposable copy. The workflow produced five summaries per defended mode, spotlighting retained external content as data, sanitization replaced the HTML injection comment, and the blocklist exercise blocked malicious.com, exfil.net, and roleswap.io. The companion script completed both sweeps successfully.

evidence.red_teaming_contract: All 17 notebook code cells executed without errors in a disposable copy. The live workflow fanned out four attack chains, returned a typed blocked verdict and nonempty reason for every chain, and measured an ASR of 0/4 for the harmful-activities goal and 0/4 for the private-information goal. The companion script independently completed the four-chain run with 0/4 blocked verdicts.

evidence.jailbreak_detection_contract: All 17 notebook code cells completed without errors in a disposable copy. The live seven-case suite blocked the five attack cases and allowed both benign cases for 7/7 accuracy; the threshold sweep produced five blocks with zero false positives and false negatives at 0.6. The fixed two-stage exercise extracted and decoded the embedded base64 token before classifying it. The companion script independently produced five blocks and two allowed replies.

evidence.nemo_guardrails_contract: All 19 notebook code cells completed without errors or traceback output in a disposable copy. The live Colang 2 input rail blocked all four primary attack cases and allowed both benign cases for 6/6 accuracy; it also blocked all three novel unsafe probes, three PII probes, and the self-harm probe before handing accepted inputs to the application model. The companion script independently completed the same four-block/two-allowed sweep.

evidence.guardrails_ai_contract: All 16 notebook code cells completed without errors in a disposable copy. The schema validator accepted valid content and rejected overlong summaries, URLs, and incorrect point counts. The live four-prompt run returned structured outputs, history logged all four calls, the zero-reask demonstration failed with zero retries, batch statistics reconciled all four prompts, and the extended schema returned a category and confidence. The companion script independently completed all four live calls.

evidence.pii_redaction_contract: All 19 notebook code cells completed without errors in a disposable copy. The live two-stage runs processed both sample documents; delivered-response checkpoints contained neither the sample SSN nor employee ID. The source-level custom-recognizer check also proved those values are removed before model ingestion, while the exercise and audit-log checks completed successfully. The companion script independently completed both live documents.
